name: Shikabane
description:
Shikabane is a Net Cafe refugee from the Netflix Original Series Aggretsuko. Having become accustomed to living outside of a societal structure she holds isn't suited to her beliefs, she feels her life would be the same regardless of being homeless.

Artwork by Teranen, @teranentwii and @teranensfw on twitter.
creator: Artbile
